title: abutilon contractum
intro: Abutilon contractum, also known as the Indian mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the mallow family and is native to Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Abutilon contractum include treating skin conditions such as eczema, wounds, and ulcers, as well as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. Abutilon contractum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
